data.title: Bybit x FXStreet Report: Japan's leadership shift sparks Nikkei rally, Yen weakness. Bybit is 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates on October 10, 2025, Bybit, ranked as the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, unveiled the latest Bybit x FXStreet TradFi Report. This report delves into the significant political shift in Japan and its profound repercussions on the global markets. It sheds light on...

data.title: Happiest Minds Technologies enhances insurance operations at MUA Insurance with Agentic AI, Oct 10, 2025.
data.description: In Bengaluru, India, on October 10, 2025, Happiest Minds Technologies Limited revealed the implementation of its Agentic AI solution. The company, listed on the NSE under the ticker symbol HAPPSTMNDS and on the BSE under the same symbol, is recognized for its AI-driven digital engineering and Mindful IT services.
